body_html:
75 per year

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Are we still paying Mark Landon? Eric was dealing
with this, so I am not
sure what was decided when the previous payment was
made. Landon's agreement
requires quarterly payments of $30k to be made to
Landon on the 15th of
January, April, July and October. The previous
payment made to Landon was for
$25,000 and not $30,000. The contract is terminable
at will on 15 days' prior
notice. Is NYSG to make payment to Landon by
January 15th and if so for $25K
or $30K?

Please advise.

Darren
